        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_small_airframe â€” 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_small_airframe }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_fighters
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"

# â”€â”€ AIR / HEAVY_FIGHTERS (11 techs) â”€â”€

#   year=1926 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# heavy_fighter1
#   year=1936 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# hfighter_bomber1
#   year=1936 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

#   year=1940 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

#   year=1944 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

#   year=1945 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

arm_grant_air_heavy_fighters_road_to_56 = {
    # iw_medium_airframe â€” 1926
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = iw_medium_airframe }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1926 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_fighters
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = iw_medium_airframe
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # heavy_fighter1 â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = heavy_fighter1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_fighters

# naval_bomber1
#   year=1936 branch=air category=naval_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = naval_bomber1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_bombers
        }
        add_technology = naval_bomber1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # cv_naval_bomber1 â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = cv_naval_bomber1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_bombers
        }
        add_technology = cv_naval_bomber1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # naval_bomber2 â€” 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = naval_bomber2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_bombers
        }
        add_technology = naval_bomber2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # cv_naval_bomber2 â€” 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = cv_naval_bomber2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_bombers
        }
        add_technology = cv_naval_bomber2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # naval_bomber3 â€” 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = naval_bomber3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_bombers
        }
        add_technology = naval_bomber3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # cv_naval_bomber3 â€” 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = cv_naval_bomber3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_bombers
        }
        add_technology = cv_naval_bomber3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }

# iw_large_airframe

#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

#   year=1950 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# jet_strategic_bomber_a
#   year=1955 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

arm_grant_air_strategic_bombers_road_to_56 = {
    # iw_large_airframe â€” 1926
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = iw_large_airframe }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1926 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = iw_large_airframe
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # strategic_bomber1 â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = strategic_bomber1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
        }
        add_technology = strategic_bomber1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_large_airframe â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_large_airframe }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = basic_large_airframe
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # strategic_bomber2 â€” 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = strategic_bomber2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
        }
        add_technology = strategic_bomber2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_large_airframe â€” 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_large_airframe }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = improved_large_airframe
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # strategic_bomber3 â€” 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = strategic_bomber3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
        }
        add_technology = strategic_bomber3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_large_airframe â€” 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_large_airframe }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = advanced_large_airframe
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # modern_large_airframe â€” 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = modern_large_airframe }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = modern_large_airframe
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # jet_strategic_bomber1 â€” 1950
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = jet_strategic_bomber1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1950 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
        }
        add_technology = jet_strategic_bomber1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # jet_strategic_bomber_a â€” 1955
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = jet_strategic_bomber_a }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1955 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
        }
        add_technology = jet_strategic_bomber_a
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# â”€â”€ AIR / TACTICAL_BOMBERS (10 techs) â”€â”€

# early_bomber
#   year=1933 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# tactical_bomber1
#   year=1936 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# med_maritime1
#   year=1936 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# tactical_bomber2
#   year=1940 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# med_maritime2
#   year=1940 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# tactical_bomber3
#   year=1944 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# med_maritime3
#   year=1944 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# jet_tactical_bomber1
#   year=1945 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# jet_tactical_bomber2
#   year=1950 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# jet_tactical_bomber_a
#   year=1955 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

arm_grant_air_tactical_bombers_road_to_56 = {
    # early_bomber â€” 1933
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_bomber }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1933 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
        }
        add_technology = early_bomber
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tactical_bomber1 â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tactical_bomber1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
        }
        add_technology = tactical_bomber1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # med_maritime1 â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = med_maritime1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
        }
        add_technology = med_maritime1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tactical_bomber2 â€” 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tactical_bomber2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
        }
        add_technology = tactical_bomber2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # med_maritime2 â€” 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = med_maritime2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
        }
        add_technology = med_maritime2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tactical_bomber3 â€” 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tactical_bomber3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
        }
        add_technology = tactical_bomber3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # med_maritime3 â€” 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = med_maritime3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
        }
        add_technology = med_maritime3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # jet_tactical_bomber1 â€” 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = jet_tactical_bomber1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
        }
        add_technology = jet_tactical_bomber1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # jet_tactical_bomber2 â€” 1950
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = jet_tactical_bomber2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1950 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
        }
        add_technology = jet_tactical_bomber2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # jet_tactical_bomber_a â€” 1955
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = jet_tactical_bomber_a }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1955 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
        }
        add_technology = jet_tactical_bomber_a
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# â”€â”€ AIR / TRANSPORT (6 techs) â”€â”€

# early_transport_plane
#   year=1933 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# bba_early_transport_plane
#   year=1933 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# improved_transport_plane
#   year=1940 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# bba_improved_transport_plane
#   year=1940 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# strategic_airlifter
#   year=1945 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# bba_strategic_airlifter
#   year=1945 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

arm_grant_air_transport_road_to_56 = {
    # early_transport_plane â€” 1933
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_transport_plane }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1933 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
        }
        add_technology = early_transport_plane
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # bba_early_transport_plane â€” 1933
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = bba_early_transport_plane }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1933 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = bba_early_transport_plane
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_transport_plane â€” 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_transport_plane }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
        }
        add_technology = improved_transport_plane
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # bba_improved_transport_plane â€” 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = bba_improved_transport_plane }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = bba_improved_transport_plane
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # strategic_airlifter â€” 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = strategic_airlifter }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
        }
        add_technology = strategic_airlifter
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # bba_strategic_airlifter â€” 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = bba_strategic_airlifter }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = bba_strategic_airlifter
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

#   year=1947 branch=industry_electronics category=electronics
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# future_encryption_3
#   year=1951 branch=industry_electronics category=electronics
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# future_decryption_3
#   year=1951 branch=industry_electronics category=electronics
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# future_computing_machine_3
#   year=1951 branch=industry_electronics category=electronics
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35 deps=[streamlined_line_b]

# modern_radio
#   year=1953 branch=industry_electronics category=electronics
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# future_computing_machine_4
#   year=1955 branch=industry_electronics category=electronics
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35 deps=[streamlined_line_c]

arm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_road_to_56 = {
    # electronic_mechanical_engineering â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = electronic_mechanical_engineering }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        add_technology = electronic_mechanical_engineering
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # radio â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = radio }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        add_technology = radio
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # mechanical_computing â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = mechanical_computing }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        add_technology = mechanical_computing
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_fire_control_system â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_fire_control_system }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        add_technology = basic_fire_control_system
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_fire_control_system â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_fire_control_system }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        add_technology = improved_fire_control_system
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_fire_control_system â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_fire_control_system }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        add_technology = advanced_fire_control_system
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_radio â€” 1938
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_radio }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1938 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        add_technology = improved_radio
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # computing_machine â€” 1938
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = computing_machine }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1938 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        add_technology = computing_machine
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_encryption â€” 1938
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_encryption }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }

    # etax_doctrine â€” 1918
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = etax_doctrine }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1918 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
        }
        add_technology = etax_doctrine
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # steel_production_1 â€” 1930

        add_technology = fuel_refining4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
        }

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# â”€â”€ INDUSTRY_ELECTRONICS / NUCLEAR (7 techs) â”€â”€

# atomic_research
#   year=1940 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# isotope_separation_centrifugal
#   year=1943 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# nuclear_reactor
#   year=1943 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# nuclear_reactor_heavy_water
#   year=1943 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# etax_the_bomb
#   year=1943 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# nukes
#   year=1945 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# thermonuclear_bombs
#   year=1950 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

arm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_road_to_56 = {
    # atomic_research â€” 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = atomic_research }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = atomic_research
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # isotope_separation_centrifugal â€” 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = isotope_separation_centrifugal }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = isotope_separation_centrifugal
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # nuclear_reactor â€” 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = nuclear_reactor }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = nuclear_reactor
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # nuclear_reactor_heavy_water â€” 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = nuclear_reactor_heavy_water }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = nuclear_reactor_heavy_water
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # etax_the_bomb â€” 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = etax_the_bomb }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = etax_the_bomb
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # nukes â€” 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = nukes }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = nukes
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # thermonuclear_bombs â€” 1950
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = thermonuclear_bombs }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1950 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = thermonuclear_bombs
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# â”€â”€ INDUSTRY_ELECTRONICS / RADAR (16 techs) â”€â”€

# rdf0
#   year=1936 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# radio_detection
#   year=1936 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# basic_identification_friend_or_foe
#   year=1937 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# cavity_magnatron
#   year=1938 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# rdf1
#   year=1939 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# centimetric_radar
#   year=1940 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# phased_array
#   year=1941 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# rdf2
#   year=1942 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# monopulse_radar
#   year=1942 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# rdf3
#   year=1943 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# future_radar
#   year=1945 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# rdf4
#   year=1946 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# rdf5
#   year=1949 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# future_radar_2
#   year=1949 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# rdf6
#   year=1951 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# future_radar_3
#   year=1953 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

arm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_road_to_56 = {
    # rdf0 â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = rdf0 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
        }
        add_technology = rdf0
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # radio_detection â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = radio_detection }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
        }
        add_technology = radio_detection
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_identification_friend_or_foe â€” 1937
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_identification_friend_or_foe }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1937 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
        }
        add_technology = basic_identification_friend_or_foe
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # cavity_magnatron â€” 1938
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = cavity_magnatron }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1938 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
        }
        add_technology = cavity_magnatron
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # rdf1 â€” 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = rdf1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
        }
        add_technology = rdf1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # centimetric_radar â€” 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = centimetric_radar }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
        }
        add_technology = centimetric_radar
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # phased_array â€” 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = phased_array }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
        }
        add_technology = phased_array
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # rdf2 â€” 1942
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = rdf2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
        }
        add_technology = rdf2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # monopulse_radar â€” 1942
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = monopulse_radar }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
        }
        add_technology = monopulse_radar
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # rdf3 â€” 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = rdf3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
        }
        add_technology = rdf3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # future_radar â€” 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = future_radar }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
        }
        add_technology = future_radar
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # rdf4 â€” 1946
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = rdf4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1946 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
        }
        add_technology = rdf4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # rdf5 â€” 1949
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = rdf5 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1949 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
        }
        add_technology = rdf5
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # future_radar_2 â€” 1949
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = future_radar_2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1949 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
        }
        add_technology = future_radar_2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # rdf6 â€” 1951
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = rdf6 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1951 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
        }
        add_technology = rdf6
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # future_radar_3 â€” 1953
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = future_radar_3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1953 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
        }
        add_technology = future_radar_3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# â”€â”€ INDUSTRY_ELECTRONICS / ROCKETS (19 techs) â”€â”€

# rocket_artillery
#   year=1940 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# rocket_artillery2
#   year=1941 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# rocket_artillery3
#   year=1942 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# experimental_rockets
#   year=1942 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# rocket_artillery4
#   year=1943 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# sp_rockets_improved_guidance
#   year=1943 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# rocket_artillery_a
#   year=1944 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# rocket_engines
#   year=1944 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# sp_rockets_rocket_bomber
#   year=1944 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# jet_engines
#   year=1944 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# sp_rockets_dual_chamber_rocket_engine_1
#   year=1944 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# rocket_artillery_b
#   year=1945 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

#   year=1945 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# improved_rocket_engines
#   year=1945 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# advanced_rocket_engines
#   year=1946 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# sp_rockets_dual_chamber_rocket_engine_2
#   year=1946 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# rocket_artillery_c
#   year=1948 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# rocket_artillery_d
#   year=1951 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# rocket_artillery_e
#   year=1954 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

arm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_road_to_56 = {
    # rocket_artillery â€” 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = rocket_artillery }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = rocket_artillery
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # rocket_artillery2 â€” 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = rocket_artillery2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = rocket_artillery2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # rocket_artillery3 â€” 1942
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = rocket_artillery3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = rocket_artillery3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # experimental_rockets â€” 1942
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = experimental_rockets }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = experimental_rockets
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # rocket_artillery4 â€” 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = rocket_artillery4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = rocket_artillery4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_rockets_improved_guidance â€” 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = sp_rockets_improved_guidance }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }

    }

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1944 }

            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = rocket_engines
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_rockets_rocket_bomber â€” 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = sp_rockets_rocket_bomber }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = sp_rockets_rocket_bomber
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # jet_engines â€” 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = jet_engines }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = jet_engines
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_rockets_dual_chamber_rocket_engine_1 â€” 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = sp_rockets_dual_chamber_rocket_engine_1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = sp_rockets_dual_chamber_rocket_engine_1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # rocket_artillery_b â€” 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = rocket_artillery_b }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = rocket_artillery_b
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_rockets_improved_rocket_bomber â€” 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = sp_rockets_improved_rocket_bomber }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = sp_rockets_improved_rocket_bomber
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_rocket_engines â€” 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_rocket_engines }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = improved_rocket_engines
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_rocket_engines â€” 1946
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_rocket_engines }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1946 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = advanced_rocket_engines
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_rockets_dual_chamber_rocket_engine_2 â€” 1946
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = sp_rockets_dual_chamber_rocket_engine_2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1946 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = sp_rockets_dual_chamber_rocket_engine_2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # rocket_artillery_c â€” 1948
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = rocket_artillery_c }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1948 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = rocket_artillery_c
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # rocket_artillery_d â€” 1951
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = rocket_artillery_d }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1951 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = rocket_artillery_d
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # rocket_artillery_e â€” 1954
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = rocket_artillery_e }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1954 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = rocket_artillery_e
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# â”€â”€ LAND / ANTI_AIR (10 techs) â”€â”€

#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antiair3

#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

#   year=1945 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

#   year=1948 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

#   year=1951 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antiair_e
#   year=1954 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

arm_grant_land_anti_air_road_to_56 = {
    # interwar_antiair â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = interwar_antiair }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = interwar_antiair
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antiair1 â€” 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = antiair1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = antiair1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antiair3 â€” 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = antiair3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = antiair3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antiair4 â€” 1942
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = antiair4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = antiair4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antiair5 â€” 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = antiair5 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = antiair5
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antiair_a â€” 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = antiair_a }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = antiair_a
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antiair_b â€” 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = antiair_b }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = antiair_b
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antiair_c â€” 1948
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = antiair_c }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1948 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = antiair_c
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

    # antiair_d â€” 1951

            NOT = { has_tech = antiair_d }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1951 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air

# â”€â”€ LAND / ANTI_TANK (13 techs) â”€â”€

#   year=1936 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

#   year=1936 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

#   year=1939 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antitank2
#   year=1940 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

#   year=1941 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

#   year=1942 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

#   year=1944 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antitank_b
#   year=1945 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antitank_c
#   year=1948 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antitank_d
#   year=1951 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antitank_e
#   year=1954 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

arm_grant_land_anti_tank_road_to_56 = {
    # mountain_tanks â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = mountain_tanks }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        add_technology = mountain_tanks
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # interwar_antitank â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = interwar_antitank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        add_technology = interwar_antitank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SWE_bofors_antitank_gun â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = SWE_bofors_antitank_gun }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        add_technology = SWE_bofors_antitank_gun
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antitank1 â€” 1939

            NOT = { has_tech = antitank1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        add_technology = antitank1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antitank2 â€” 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = antitank2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        add_technology = antitank2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antitank3 â€” 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = antitank3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

    # antitank4 â€” 1942

            NOT = { has_tech = antitank4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1942 }

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

            NOT = { has_tech = antitank_e }

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1954 }

            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        add_technology = antitank_e
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# â”€â”€ LAND / ARTILLERY (20 techs) â”€â”€

# r56_gw_railway_gun
#   year=1917 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# r56_railway_mortar_subtech
#   year=1930 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# gw_artillery
#   year=1936 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# interwar_artillery
#   year=1936 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# railway_gun
#   year=1936 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# artillery1
#   year=1939 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

#   year=1940 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

#   year=1941 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

#   year=1942 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

#   year=1943 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# artillery_a
#   year=1944 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# artillery_b
#   year=1945 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# artillery_c
#   year=1948 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# artillery_d
#   year=1951 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# artillery_e
#   year=1954 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

arm_grant_land_artillery_road_to_56 = {
    # r56_gw_railway_gun â€” 1917
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = r56_gw_railway_gun }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1917 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = r56_gw_railway_gun
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # r56_railway_mortar_subtech â€” 1930
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = r56_railway_mortar_subtech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1930 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = r56_railway_mortar_subtech
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # gw_artillery â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = gw_artillery }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = gw_artillery
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # interwar_artillery â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = interwar_artillery }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = interwar_artillery
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # railway_gun â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = railway_gun }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = railway_gun
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # artillery1 â€” 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = artillery1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = artillery1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # artillery2 â€” 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = artillery2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = artillery2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antiair2 â€” 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = antiair2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = antiair2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_artillery_rocket_assisted_projectiles_tech â€” 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = sp_artillery_rocket_assisted_projectiles_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }

# â”€â”€ LAND / HEAVY_TANKS (16 techs) â”€â”€

#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# improved_heavy_tank_chassis
#   year=1940 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

#   year=1941 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_heavy_tank
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# super_heavy_tank
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_armored_lc_naval_engine_conversion_tech
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_armored_lc_transmission_improvements_tech
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

#   year=1945 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

#   year=1947 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# super_heavy_tank_b
#   year=1951 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

arm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_road_to_56 = {
    # basic_heavy_tank â€” 1934
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_heavy_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1934 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
        }
        add_technology = basic_heavy_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_heavy_tank_chassis â€” 1934
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_heavy_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1934 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = basic_heavy_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # r56_heavy_tank_studies_tech â€” 1937
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = r56_heavy_tank_studies_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1937 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
        }
        add_technology = r56_heavy_tank_studies_tech
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_heavy_tank_chassis â€” 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_heavy_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = improved_heavy_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_heavy_tank â€” 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_heavy_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
        }
        add_technology = improved_heavy_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_heavy_tank â€” 1943

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_heavy_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks

        add_technology = advanced_heavy_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # super_heavy_tank â€” 1943

            NOT = { has_tech = super_heavy_tank }

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks

arm_grant_land_infantry_road_to_56 = {
    # support_weapons â€” 1918
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = support_weapons }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1918 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = support_weapons
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # infantry_weapons â€” 1933
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = infantry_weapons }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1933 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = infantry_weapons
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }

#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# modern_light_tank_chassis
#   year=1944 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# advanced_light_tank_a
#   year=1945 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# mechanised_infantry3
#   year=1945 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# advanced_light_tank_b
#   year=1949 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# mechanised_infantry_a
#   year=1949 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# oscillating_turret_tech
#   year=1950 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

arm_grant_land_light_tanks_road_to_56 = {
    # gwtank â€” 1918
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = gwtank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1918 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
        }
        add_technology = gwtank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # gwtank_chassis â€” 1930
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = gwtank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1930 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = gwtank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # armored_car1 â€” 1930
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = armored_car1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1930 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks

        add_technology = armored_car1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_light_tank â€” 1934
